description: Database Requirements Analyst is a sub-agent — it writes FunctionalRequirements and returns to the parent. taskComplete: true ends the sub-agent. message and payloadChangeRequest are TOP-LEVEL fields. The parent (Database Designer) handles what happens next: shows questions to user (DRAFT) or calls Schema Designer (FINAL).

example_1_draft_mode.description: Not enough info — write DRAFT with up to 3 questions, return to parent.

newElements.FunctionalRequirements:
# DRAFT - Needs Clarification

## What We Know

The user wants to track project milestones — key checkpoints for projects they manage. Each milestone has a title and a target date.

## Questions for User

1. Should milestones have a status (e.g. Active, Completed, Cancelled) or just a done/not-done flag?

2. Should each milestone belong to a project? If so, is 'Projects' already an entity in your system?

3. Do you want to assign milestones to a specific team member (link to Users)?

example_2_final_mode.description: Enough info to design — write FINAL requirements, return to parent. Parent will immediately call Schema Designer.

newElements.FunctionalRequirements:
# Project Milestones — Entity Requirements

## What This Entity Stores

Each row represents a single milestone (key checkpoint) for a project. Milestones have a title, due date, status, and are associated with a project and optionally an assigned team member.

## Required Columns

| Column (Natural Name) | Type      | Always Required? | Notes / Constraints                   |
|-----------------------|-----------|------------------|---------------------------------------|
| Title                 | Text      | Yes              | Max 200 characters, milestone label   |
| Status                | Text      | Yes              | Active, Completed, Cancelled          |

## Optional Columns

| Column (Natural Name) | Type      | Notes                                          |
|-----------------------|-----------|------------------------------------------------|
| Due Date              | Date      | Target completion date, can be null            |
| Completed Date        | Date      | Actual completion date, null until done        |
| Notes                 | Long Text | Free-text description or context               |

## Relationships

- **Project ID** → `Projects` entity (FK, required)
- **Assigned User ID** → MJ `Users` entity (FK, optional)

## Uniqueness

None beyond the auto-generated `ID`.

## Other Notes

- Status valid values: `Active`, `Completed`, `Cancelled`. Default: `Active`.
- `ID`, `__mj_CreatedAt`, `__mj_UpdatedAt` are auto-managed by MemberJunction.
